name: Arc
summary: The Arc class defines an arc that is a two-point line with an optional curve radius. It can be created using either two points and a radius or three points.

constructors.name: Arc(ViewBase, Point, Point, Double)
constructors.signature: public Arc(ViewBase inView, Point inPoint1, Point inPoint2, double inRadius)
constructors.summary: Creates a new arc instance with standard attributes and the given two points and radius.

params.name: inView
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: inPoint1
params.doc: The start point to be used.

params.name: inPoint2
params.doc: The end point to be used.

params.name: inRadius
params.doc: The radius to be used.

constructors.name: Arc(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point)
constructors.signature: public Arc(ViewBase inView, Point inPoint1, Point inPoint2, Point inPoint3)
constructors.summary: Creates a new arc instance with standard attributes and the given three points.

params.name: inView
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: inPoint1
params.doc: The start point to be used.

params.name: inPoint2
params.doc: The end point to be used.

params.name: inPoint3
params.doc: The center point to be used.

constructors.name: Arc(ViewBase, Point, Point, Double, Arc.ArcAttributes)
constructors.signature: public Arc(ViewBase inView, Point inPoint1, Point inPoint2, double inRadius, Arc.ArcAttributes inAttributes)
constructors.summary: Creates a new arc instance with the given two points, radius and specified attributes.

params.name: inView
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: inPoint1
params.doc: The start point to be used.

params.name: inPoint2
params.doc: The end point to be used.

params.name: inRadius
params.doc: The radius to be used.

params.name: inAttributes
params.doc: The arc attributes to be used.

constructors.name: Arc(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point, Arc.ArcAttributes)
constructors.signature: public Arc(ViewBase inView, Point StartPoint, Point EndPoint, Point CenterPoint, Arc.ArcAttributes inAttributes)
constructors.summary: Creates a new arc instance with the given three points and specified attributes.

params.name: inView
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: StartPoint
params.doc: The start point to be used.

params.name: EndPoint
params.doc: The end point to be used.

params.name: CenterPoint
params.doc: The center point to be used.

params.name: inAttributes
params.doc: The arc attributes to be used.

methods.summary: Calls the system to delete the object.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(Dictionary<String, Double>.)
methods.signature: public bool GetDoubleUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, double> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref double Value)
methods.summary: Gets a double property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be gotten.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.
